text: 3. **`spawn_status_heartbeat_publisher`** (the second ~30s timer / direct `set_status`) → **DELETED** (function, its `set_status`/`cache_status`/`status_from_session` helpers, the import in `server.rs`, and the `lifecycle.rs` spawn call). Its TTL-refresh role folded into the per-session `on_tick`. `set_status` itself deleted from the provider — there is no direct-publish seam left. [...] `on_channels_changed` is fed each observe tick → the derived h-tag set corrects join/leave (fixes stale-h-tags). `mark_dead`/session-end teardown calls `on_session_ended` **before** `mark_dead`, ordered, publishing a final expiring 30315. Nothing publishes directly; the durable outbox is the single executor.
